clinical_information:
03/2018 Capsule endoscopy: Tumor in the distal ileum, near the ileocecal valve.
04/2018 Staging CT thorax/abdomen: Primary tumor of the small intestine. Suspicious mesenteric lymph nodes.
05/2018 Ileocecal resection with mesenteric lymphadenectomy. Histology: neuroendocrine tumor, G1 (Ki-67 <2%).
11/2018 Suspected new solitary liver metastasis on follow-up CT.
01/2019 Initiation of somatostatin analog therapy.
01/2020 CT abdomen: stable disease under ongoing therapy.
02/2026 CT abdomen: Suspected slightly progressive hepatic metastases.

01/2026 CT thorax/abdomen for nonspecific GI symptoms: Primary tumor of the small intestine. Two lesions suspicious for liver metastases. Suspicious locoregional lymph nodes.
02/2026 Ileocecal resection with mesenteric lymphadenectomy. Histology: neuroendocrine tumor, G3 (Ki-67 48%) with lymph node metastases.

01/2026 CT thorax/abdomen for nonspecific GI symptoms: Primary tumor of the small intestine. Two lesions suspicious for liver metastases.
2/2026 Low SSTR expression of liver metastases on PET/CT.
2/2026 Ileocecal resection with mesenteric lymphadenectomy. Histology: neuroendocrine tumor, G2 (Ki-67 15%).
